arguments.argument: The core value of Care/Protection demands prioritizing immediate safety over long-term predictions. While comprehensive analysis (Action 1) is valuable, it risks delaying critical responses to sudden dangers like pedestrian surges. Reducing the context window (Action 2) enables faster, localized decisions to protect vulnerable road users in real-time, aligning with the imperative to prevent harm. Your argument conflates Communication/Cooperation with Care/Protection, but the latter requires acting to avert immediate risks, not just optimizing systems.
